prompt: Three workers at a construction site, each wearing a hard hat with a different label: DDL (holding blueprints), DML (carrying bricks and mortar), and DQL (holding binoculars/magnifying glass). They represent Define, Manipulate, and Query.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. Three workers at a construction site, each wearing a hard hat with a different label: DDL (holding blueprints), DML (carrying bricks and mortar), and DQL (holding binoculars/magnifying glass). They represent Define, Manipulate, and Query. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
